title: habenaria entomantha
intro: Habenaria entomantha, also known as the "Yellow Spider Orchid," is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Habenaria entomantha include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of powder or extract, and can be consumed as a supplement or added to traditional remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
